candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: The structure of two oxoacids is shown below. Which would be a stronger acid, and why?
candidate_problem_record.raw_answer_text: $HOF$, because the $H-O$ bond is weaker than in $HOCl$ as fluorine is smaller than chlorine
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
下面显示了两种羟基的结构。哪个会是更强的酸,为什么?

A. HOCl,因为 $\text{H}-\text{O}$ 键比 $\text{H}-\text{O}-\text{F}$ 键弱,原因是氯原子比氟原子更大
B. HOCl,因为 $\text{H}-\text{O}$ 键比 $\text{H}-\text{O}-\text{F}$ 键强,原因是氯原子的电负性高于氟原子
C. HOF,因为 $\text{H}-\text{O}-\text{F}$ 键比 $\text{H}-\text{O}$ 键强,原因是氟原子的电负性高于氯原子
D. HOF,因为 $\text{H}-\text{O}-\text{F}$ 键比 $\text{H}-\text{O}$ 键弱,原因是氟原子比氯原子更小
metadata.explanation_zh: 在一种氧酸中,O-H键越弱,酸性就越强,因为H+离子更容易解离。HOF中的O-F键比HOCl中的O-Cl键更强,这是因为氟比氯具有更高的电负性,原因是氟的原子半径更小。如果O-F键更强,那么相应地O-H键就更弱,因此HOF是一种更强的酸。

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The prompt is clear once paired with the image: it asks which of the two shown oxoacids is stronger and why. The image is small but still readable enough to identify the pair as H-O-Cl and H-O-F, and the answer provides both the selected acid and the intended explanation.
